overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a rainy urban environment. The clip follows a red transit bus navigating a wet intersection before transitioning to a first-person perspective walking along a commercial sidewalk lined with distinctive spherical lighting fixtures.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban intersection with transit bus

events.description: large semi-truck passes close to camera on the right side
yellow taxi passes by on the right while bus continues turning

agents.ego_description: following the red transit bus through the wet intersection, maintaining steady distance behind the vehicle

notable_agents.action: red transit bus making a left turn through the intersection
red semi-truck with advertising on trailer passing by on the right

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign mounted on pole at street corner
multi-story curved commercial building with colorful horizontal stripes
traffic signal on tall pole at intersection corner
tall palm trees visible in the background along the street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a rain-soaked urban intersection where a red transit bus is executing a left turn. The camera follows the bus from a vehicle-mounted perspective as a large semi-truck passes by on the right. A modern curved building with colorful stripes dominates the left side of the frame while palm trees line the distant right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city street with commercial buildings

events.description: black sedan passes by on the left side of the frame
camera begins to slow and transition toward the sidewalk area

agents.ego_description: continuing to follow the transit bus down the rain-soaked street, navigating through moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: transit bus driving straight down the wet street ahead of camera

entered.detail: large vertical billboard with commercial advertisement visible above the street
multi-story commercial structure with flat roof and signage

segments.scene_description: The camera continues driving down the wet city street, following the transit bus as it moves away from the intersection. A large billboard rises on the right side while commercial buildings line the left. The rain creates reflective surfaces on the asphalt as other vehicles pass by.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with spherical lighting fixtures

events.description: camera transitions from vehicle perspective to walking on the sidewalk
walking past a yellow fire hydrant and parked motorcycle on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to a commercial building, observing traffic passing by on the adjacent street

entered.detail: building facade featuring large illuminated yellow spherical lights and commercial signage
bright yellow fire hydrant located on the grass median between sidewalk and street
concrete retaining wall topped with green hedge separating sidewalk from building entrance
concrete stairs leading up to a recessed building entrance with glass doors

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to first-person walking along a rain-soaked sidewalk beside a commercial building adorned with distinctive yellow spherical lights. The camera passes a yellow fire hydrant and parked motorcycle while continuing along the path bordered by a hedge wall on the left and a busy street on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous movement from a vehicle-mounted perspective at a rainy intersection to a first-person walk along a commercial sidewalk. It begins by tracking a red transit bus executing a left turn past a colorful curved building, while a large semi-truck passes by on the right. As the camera continues driving down the wet city street, the view follows the bus away from the intersection past a towering billboard and reflective asphalt. The perspective then shifts to a first-person walk along a rain-soaked sidewalk, passing a yellow fire hydrant and a parked motorcycle. The scene finally moves alongside a commercial building adorned with distinctive yellow spherical lights, bordered by a hedge wall and a busy street.
